name: powerbi-backup
description: Power BI Report Automation Portal — backend (NestJS) + frontend (Angular).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
